feedback.text: Hello, Please consider this act to also include protections for video games that people have already purchased. There is a growing trend of video games developers including online connections for video games that have no need for them, just for the sake of including unnecessary components into video games such as online stores. Unfortunately, that also means that game servers shutting down will also mean that these unnecesary online service will be unreachable and this will make video games that people have paid full price for unplayable, meaning products that people have paid full price for will be unusable.
